description: Account of the Qodesh: list of arrears in rent owed by different tenants in the synagogue compound, from December 1042 CE to April 1043 CE. The rent was collected and the document written by the cantor and scribe Yefet b. David b. Shekanya. He then lists the current payments for one month, Jumādā I; some apartments are said to have been vacant. The list is large in size, written in big characters, and was probably intended for public display. (Information from CUDL and Gil, Documents, pp. 193 #22)
tags: Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya, account, qodesh, tenant, 11th c
description_he: חשבון הקדש: רשימת פיגורי שכר דירה של שוכרים בחצר בית הכנסת, דצמבר 1042 עד אפריל 1043. נכתב ונגבה בידי החזן והסופר יפת בן דוד בן שכניה. הרשימה גדולה, בכתב גדול, כנראה לתצוגה ציבורית.
